input_context.user_described_change: Bump the maintainer-review cadence from quarterly to monthly.

findings.name: Tighten maintenance review cadence
findings.summary: The maintainer MUST review issues and pull requests at least once per month, replacing the prior quarterly cadence.
findings.motivation: User reports the quarterly cadence allowed three open security advisories to age past their disclosure SLA. Monthly review keeps the SLA reachable while staying lightweight enough for a single-maintainer project.
findings.proposed_changes: Replace the §"Cadence" paragraph in `SPECIFICATION.md` with: "The maintainer MUST review issues and pull requests at least once per month. The maintainer MUST publish a monthly summary noting any unresolved security advisories."
